global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'PixelForge' logo positioned at the top left. The main subject is highlighted by a prominent headline 'Level up today' and supporting body text 'No ads in first week' centered in the middle. A call-to-action button 'Order now' is located at the bottom center. The ad includes various segmented crops of game elements as decorative visuals on the left and right sides.
global.visual_style: Vibrant and engaging with a focus on game elements
global.main_message: Encouragement to engage with the game without ads in the initial week.

elements.label: PixelForge text logo
elements.description: The brand name 'PixelForge' displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a bold font.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Supporting descriptive text below the headline.

elements.label: Call to Action Button
elements.description: A button located at the bottom of the ad, prompting users to take action.

elements.label: Play symbol
elements.description: A right-facing triangle icon, likely indicating an action or navigation, positioned on the right side of the crop.

elements.label: Segmented crop of game elements
elements.description: A crop showing two game elements with circular shapes, positioned vertically.

elements.label: Segmented crop element
elements.description: A small brown circle on a light orange background, likely part of a larger design element.

elements.label: Segmented crop
elements.description: A small square with a brown dot in the center, likely part of a larger visual element.

elements.label: Segmented crop of a game element
elements.description: A small square with a brown dot, likely part of a game interface, positioned in the upper left area of the crop.

elements.label: Segmented crop of a game element
elements.description: A small circular brown dot within a square, likely part of a game interface.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for PixelForge Legends promoting gameplay without ads in the first week.
